content.en:
After a long time, Ye Tian's transformation was completely over.

And at this time, Ye Tian found that his half-step perfectly controlled body of the Extreme Creation Realm actually contained the power of the Extreme Dao, and the power of the Extreme Dao of the Sword and the half-step perfectly controlled body were almost perfectly integrated, thus making the half-step perfectly controlled body reach an incredible level.

"Extreme Body!"

Ye Tianming enlightened.

At this moment, his half-step perfectly controlled body seemed to have reached a realm that had never been recorded before.

Of course, it's just that the general classics don't record it, but the Lord of Time must know it.

After the body of control became the body of the Extreme Dao, Ye Tian's strength could be said to have skyrocketed, and he even doubted whether he would be able to fight against the weaker high-level perfect master.

Inexplicably reached the extreme path body, Ye Tian was very confused, and he was a little confused about his future cultivation, he didn't know how to practice, if he took the wrong path, wouldn't he regret it?

"Looks like we have to ask the Lord of Time!"

Ye Tian decided.

Although he wanted to consult the Lord of Canggu more, it was a pity that he had no way to contact the Lord of Canggu, and he couldn't see the Lord of Canggu, unless it was the Lord of Canggu who saw him.

Subsequently.

Ye Tian went to Tower No. 6 to visit and consult the Lord of Time, and informed the Lord of Time in advance.

Soon.

The Lord of Time saw Ye Tian and let Ye Tian enter the No. 6 Tower.

"I've seen the Lord of Time!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

When the Lord of Time saw Ye Tian, his face was slightly surprised.

"You are the body of the Extreme Dao!!"

The Lord of Time.

"Yes!" Ye Tian nodded, "I don't know much about the Extreme Dao Body, so I'm here to ask the Lord of Time." "

The Lord of Time smiled bitterly: "I don't know much about the Extreme Dao Body, but you can consult the Lord of the Ancients." "

"Ask the Lord of Canggu?" Ye Tian said helplessly: "I can't contact the Lord of Canggu. "

"Hahaha, don't worry, this seat will immediately tell the Lord of the Ancients that you have condensed the body of the Extreme Dao in the half-step Perfect Controller Realm of the Creation Extreme Realm, and the Lord of the Ancients will definitely see you!" said the Lord of Time.

"Thank you, Lord of Time!"

Ye Tian thanked.

Subsequently, the Lord of Time contacted the Lord of the Ancients.

Soon, a big hand reached in and directly led Ye Tian to a void area.

Here, Ye Tian met the Lord of the Ancients.

The Lord of the Ancient Ages glanced at Ye Tian, as if he had seen Ye Tian through.

"Sword Extreme Dao Body, you are very good, you can master the Extreme Dao Body in the Extreme Creation Realm in half a step in the Perfect Controller Realm, but it is not enough, it is not the best choice to achieve a Perfect Controller with the Extreme Dao Body of the Sword. The Lord of Canggu said lightly.

"Please also ask the Lord of the Ancient for advice!"

Ye Tian said respectfully.

At this time, the Lord of the Ancient said: "Above the super-perfect controllers are the Perfect Controllers of the Void Realm, the Perfect Controllers of the True Realm, and the Perfect Controllers of the Extreme Realm. And if you want to be a perfect controller of the extreme realm, you must master the body of the extreme path in the realm of the half-step perfect controller of the extreme realm, but the body of the extreme path is also divided into strong and weak, if you are in the realm of the half-step perfect controller of the extreme realm, and break through with the body of the extreme path of the sword, then in the future, your extreme body can only be the extreme path of the sword, and if you want to make changes, it will be difficult to do it. And the best Extreme Dao Body is naturally the Extreme Dao that fits itself, followed by the Extreme Dao of Time and Space, the Extreme Dao of Time and Space is the most powerful Extreme Dao, and the third is the Extreme Dao Body of various single attributes. "

"I see!"

Ye Tian understood.

The most suitable Extreme Path Body for him is the Endless Extreme Path Body, but it is too difficult to master the Endless Extreme Path.

Or, he can choose the Pole of Time and Space, which is also promising.

Of course, if you really can't do it, then break through with the body of the sword and the extreme path, and there is still hope to become the perfect controller of the extreme realm in the future, but you can't be invincible at this level.

The Lord of the Ancient Dynasty said: "You have only become a half-step perfect master of the Extreme Realm, you can try to master the Extreme Dao of Time and Space, or to master the power of the Extreme Dao of your own Dao, if you really can't comprehend it, it is not too late to break through with the Extreme Dao of the Sword." In addition, the power of the Sword Path will help you break the chains of the Forge of Possession. The number of Pole Creation Chains that an ordinary Extreme Creation Realm half-step perfect master can break is twelve, while the number of Extreme Creation Chains of the Extreme Dao Body is thirty-six. "

"Thirty-six chains of pole making!"

Ye Tian was surprised.

He realized that the potential limit of the Extreme Dao Body was far beyond the half-step perfectly controlled body of the ordinary Extreme Creation Realm, and if he broke the thirty-six chains of the Extreme Realm, his strength would increase a lot.

I have to say that the potential of the Extreme Dao Body is terrifying!

With the guidance of the Lord of Canggu, Ye Tian's future cultivation was clear.

"In addition, you have mastered the power of the Extreme Dao, and the main body stays in the Daoless Tower, and I can ensure that no one of the Extreme Dao in the Ruins of Eternity will be able to erase you. Otherwise, if you have the news of the extreme path exposed, some old immortal guys may really be shameless enough to attack you. The Lord of the Ancients said.

"Thank you, Lord of the Ancients!"

Ye Tian said gratefully.

And he also roughly guessed the strength of the Lord of the Ancient in his heart.

It is not the perfect controller of the virtual realm, nor the perfect controller of the true realm, but the perfect controller of the extreme realm, otherwise the Lord of the Ancient would not have such confidence.

At last.

The Lord of the Ancient said: "Ye Tian, your talent is very demonic, if you don't fall in the future, you have a certain hope of reaching the perfect controller of the extreme realm, I won't accept apprentices, but I won't be stingy with the juniors of the Daoless Tower, this time I will give you a chance." "

I saw that the Lord of Canggu took out a token and handed it to Ye Tian.

"This is the Space-Time Ancestral Order, take him to enter a place called the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, you know, I don't know how many perfect controllers want to enter the Space-Time Ancestral Realm, but there is no chance. The space-time ancestral realm is a special area, even the perfect controller of the extreme realm cannot interfere with the space-time ancestral realm, where you can comprehend the power of the space-time extreme path and even other extreme paths, as well as other opportunities, of course, all the benefits need to be fought for by yourself. Every living being can only stay in the space-time ancestral realm for 100 million eternal years, and beyond this time, they will be excluded. "The Lord of the Ancients.

Ye Tian took the Ancestral Order of Time and Space and thanked the Lord of Canggu again.

Then, Ye Tian left here.

"Ye Tian, grow up well, I hope that the Wudao Tower will give birth to another Extreme Realm Perfect Controller!"

The Lord of the Ancient muttered.

Immediately, he continued his practice.

Even if he reaches his level, he still has to cultivate, after all, everyone wants to climb to a higher level.

......

After coming back, Ye Tian began to refine the Space-Time Ancestral Order, and after the refining was completed, he immediately urged the Space-Time Ancestral Order.
